text: Engineering Department Documentation  2024  System Architecture Overview The platform is built on a microservices architecture deployed on AWS infrastructure. Technology Stack - Backend: Python 3.11, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy - Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS - Database: PostgreSQL 15 (primary), Redis 7 (cache) - Vector Store: ChromaDB with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings - LLM: TinyLlama 1.1B (on-premise), GPT-4 (fallback) - Infrastructure: AWS ECS, RDS, ElastiCache, CloudFront - CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes  Team Structure - Total engineers: 42 - Frontend team: 10 engineers - Backend team: 14 engineers - DevOps/Cloud: 6 engineers - ML/AI team: 8 engineers - QA team: 4 engineers  Sprint Metrics (Q4 2024) - Average velocity: 84 story points per sprint - Bug resolution time: 2.3 days average - Code review turnaround: 4 hours average - Deployment frequency: 2.4 times per week - Mean time to recovery (MTTR): 47 minutes - System uptime: 99.94%  Infrastructure  Costs - Monthly AWS bill: ₹18,40,000 - Cost per user: ₹42/month - Storage used: 48 TB - Peak concurrent users: 12,400 - API response time p99: 340ms  Security  Compliance - All data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3) - RBAC implemented at API and database layer - Penetration testing conducted quarterly - SOC 2 Type II certification: In progress - VAPT completed: August 2024  0 critical, 3 medium (resolved) - Access logs retained for 90 days  Q4 2024 Deliverables -  RBAC Intelligence Platform v2.0 launched -  Vector search latency reduced by 40% -  Mobile app v3.2 released (iOS  Android) -  API gateway migration completed -  GraphQL API layer (in progress  70% complete) -  Multi-region deployment (planned Q1 2025)  Engineering Budget FY2025 - Total approved: ₹4,80,00,000 - Salaries: 65% (₹3,12,00,000) - Infrastructure: 20% (₹96,00,000) - Tools  licenses: 10% (₹48,00,000) - Training: 5% (₹24,00,000)  Hiring Plan 2025 - 8 new backend engineers - 4 ML engineers (LLM specialisation) - 3 DevOps engineers - 2 security engineers

Finance Department Report  FY 2024  Annual Financial Summary  Revenue - Total Annual Revenue: ₹48,50,00,000 (₹48.5 Crore) - Q1 Revenue: ₹10,20,00,000 - Q2 Revenue: ₹11,80,00,000 - Q3 Revenue: ₹13,40,00,000 - Q4 Revenue: ₹13,10,00,000 - Year-over-Year growth: 34% increase from FY2023  Profit  Loss - Gross Profit: ₹29,10,00,000 (60% gross margin) - Operating Profit (EBIT): ₹14,55,00,000 (30% operating margin) - Net Profit after tax: ₹10,18,50,000 (21% net margin) - Profit increase vs FY2023: 42% - EBITDA: ₹16,97,50,000  Operational Expenses - Total Operating Expenses: ₹33,95,00,000 - Salaries  Benefits: ₹19,40,00,000 (57% of opex) - Infrastructure  Technology: ₹4,85,00,000 (14%) - Marketing  Sales: ₹4,85,00,000 (14%) - Office  Admin: ₹2,42,50,000 (7%) - RD: ₹2,42,50,000 (7%)  Balance Sheet Highlights - Total Assets: ₹62,40,00,000 - Total Liabilities: ₹18,72,00,000 - Net Worth / Equity: ₹43,68,00,000 - Cash  Cash Equivalents: ₹12,10,00,000 - Debt-to-Equity Ratio: 0.43 (healthy)  Key Financial Ratios - Current Ratio: 2.8 (liquidity strong) - Quick Ratio: 2.1 - Return on Equity (ROE): 23.3% - Return on Assets (ROA): 16.3% - Earnings Per Share (EPS): ₹42.50  Budget vs Actuals FY2024 - Revenue Budget: ₹44,00,00,000  Actual: ₹48,50,00,000  Variance: 10.2% - Opex Budget: ₹36,00,00,000  Actual: ₹33,95,00,000  Variance: -5.7% (favourable) - Capex Budget: ₹8,00,00,000  Actual: ₹7,20,00,000  Variance: -10% (favourable)  FY2025 Financial Projections - Projected Revenue: ₹65,00,00,000 (34% growth target) - Projected Net Profit: ₹13,65,00,000 - Approved Capex: ₹12,00,00,000 - Headcount budget increase: 18%  Compliance  Audit - Statutory audit completed: October 2024  Clean report - Tax filing status: Advance tax paid (100%) - GST compliance: 100% on-time filing - Internal audit findings: 2 minor observations (resolved)

Employee Handbook  General Policies 2024  Welcome Welcome to the company. This handbook outlines the general policies, benefits, and expectations for all employees regardless of department or seniority level. Office Locations - Headquarters: Chennai, Tamil Nadu - Branch offices: Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad - All offices open Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM  Employee Benefits - Health insurance: ₹5,00,000 family floater (employee  spouse  2 children) - Accidental insurance: ₹10,00,000 per employee - Term life insurance: 3x annual salary - Meal allowance: ₹3,500 per month - Transport allowance: ₹2,000 per month - Internet allowance (WFH): ₹1,000 per month  General Leave Policy - Total leave days per year: 36 (Annual  Casual  Sick combined) - Public holidays: 12 days per year as per state government calendar - Leave applications must be submitted 3 days in advance except emergencies - Leave without pay (LWP) available after exhausting all leave types  Remote Work Employees may work remotely up to 2 days per week as per company policy. Full remote work available only for certain approved roles with VP approval.

Policy - Total leave days per year: 36 (Annual Casual Sick combined) - Public holidays: 12 days per year as per state government calendar - Leave applications must be submitted 3 days in advance except emergencies - Leave without pay (LWP) available after exhausting all leave types Remote Work Employees may work remotely up to 2 days per week as per company policy. Full remote work available only for certain approved roles with VP approval. Facilities - Cafeteria available at all locations with subsidised meals - Gymnasium available at HQ (6:00 AM to 9:00 PM) - Free parking for employees at all locations - Library and reading room at HQ  IT  Equipment Policy - Laptops provided to all employees (returned on resignation) - Mobile phone allowance: ₹800/month for roles requiring field work - Personal use of company equipment must be limited and professional - VPN required for all remote access to company systems  Grievance Policy - All grievances must be reported to HR within 10 working days - Anonymous complaint portal available on intranet - Investigation completed within 30 working days - Zero retaliation policy for good-faith grievance reporters  Exit Policy - Notice period: 30 days (junior), 60 days (senior/management) - Full and final settlement within 45 days of last working day - Experience letter issued within 7 days of exit - NDAs remain in effect for 2 years post-employment  Company Values - Integrity: We do what we say - Innovation: We challenge the status quo - Inclusion: Every voice matters - Impact: Results over activity

HR Policy Document  Company Handbook 2024  Leave Policy - Annual Leave: 18 paid leave days per year - Casual Leave: 6 casual leave days per year - Sick Leave: 12 sick leave days per year - Maternity Leave: 26 weeks paid maternity leave - Paternity Leave: 5 days paid paternity leave - Leave encashment available for unused annual leave at year end  Remote Work Policy Employees may work remotely up to 2 days per week. Remote work requires manager approval. All remote employees must be available during core hours: 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM IST. Working Hours Standard working hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday. Flexible start time allowed between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM with prior approval. Attendance Policy - Employees must maintain 90% attendance per quarter - Late arrivals beyond 15 minutes will be marked as half-day absence - Three consecutive absences without notice triggers disciplinary review  Salary  Payroll - Salaries are disbursed on the last working day of each month - Annual increments are processed in April each year - Performance bonuses paid in Q4 based on KPI achievement  Recruitment Policy - All open positions must be posted internally for 7 days before external recruitment - Referral bonus: ₹25,000 for successful permanent hire referrals - Background verification mandatory for all new hires  Code of Conduct - Zero tolerance for harassment, discrimination, or workplace violence - Confidentiality of company information is mandatory - Conflict of interest must be disclosed to HR immediately - Social media policy: employees must not share confidential company data  Performance Review - Annual performance reviews conducted in March - Mid-year check-ins conducted in September - Performance Improvement Plans (PIP) issued for below-average performers - Rating scale: Outstanding / Exceeds Expectations / Meets Expectations / Below Expectations  Training  Development - Each employee is entitled to ₹15,000 annual training budget - Mandatory compliance training every 6 months - Leadership development program available for senior staff

Marketing Department Report  FY 2024  Campaign Performance Summary Total campaigns launched in FY2024: 24 campaigns across digital and traditional channels. Digital Marketing - Total digital ad spend: ₹48,00,000 - Total impressions: 12.4 million - Click-through rate (CTR): 3.8% (industry average: 2.1%) - Conversion rate: 6.2% - Cost per acquisition (CPA): ₹1,240  Social Media Metrics - LinkedIn followers: 45,200 (growth: 38% YoY) - Instagram followers: 89,500 (growth: 52% YoY) - Twitter/X followers: 22,100 (growth: 15% YoY) - Total social media reach: 3.2 million per month - Engagement rate: 4.7% average across platforms  Email Marketing - Total subscribers: 1,85,000 - Average open rate: 28.4% - Average click rate: 7.1% - Unsubscribe rate: 0.3% - Revenue attributed to email: ₹92,00,000  Brand Campaigns  Q1 Campaign: Rise Together - Budget: ₹12,00,000 - Reach: 4.2 million - Brand recall improvement: 18%  Q2 Campaign: Innovation First - Budget: ₹15,00,000 - Reach: 5.8 million - Lead generation: 3,240 qualified leads  Q3 Campaign: Digital Dragon - Budget: ₹18,00,000 - Reach: 7.1 million - Conversion: ₹3.2 Cr attributed revenue  Q4 Campaign: Year End Excellence - Budget: ₹10,00,000 - Reach: 3.9 million - Seasonal sales lift: 23%  Market Share  Positioning - Current market share: 14.2% (up from 11.8% in FY2023) - Competitive ranking: 3 in segment - Net Promoter Score (NPS): 67 (Excellent) - Customer satisfaction score: 4.3/5.0  Marketing Budget FY2025 Plan - Total approved budget: ₹1,20,00,000 - Digital allocation: 60% (₹72,00,000) - Events  sponsorship: 20% (₹24,00,000) - Content  PR: 15% (₹18,00,000) - Research: 5% (₹6,00,000)
